name: Caden Table Lamp - 22.25 Inch Height - TBL4015 - Gold - Safavieh
description:
Illuminate your space with the Caden 22.25 inch table lamp, a piece that combines classic design with modern flair. This lamp features a stunning gold finish, bringing a touch of elegance to any room. Crafted with a marble and resin base, it ensures a sturdy foundation while adding a sophisticated touch to your decor. The glass shade provides a gentle diffusion of light, creating a warm, inviting ambiance perfect for any setting.

Ideal for your living room, bedroom, or office, the Caden table lamp is both functional and stylish. Its sleek silhouette complements various design aesthetics, making it a versatile addition to your home. Whether you're reading, relaxing, or working, this lamp enhances your environment with its sophisticated glow. Add the Caden to your space and experience the perfect blend of design and illumination.
